comment: End-to-end fixture: synthetic MFT transcript 5 (14 messages, ONLY 4 asks). The precision fixture — a realistic noisy channel where most messages are announcements, status updates, resolved threads, venting, social chatter, log pastes and acknowledgments. The headline assertion is total = 4: anything higher means the extractor is FABRICATING questions from statements. Key contrast pair: the EU-partner message (concrete resolvable symptom, implicit ask -> extract) vs the Mondays-nightmare message (pure mood, no problem to solve -> zero). Also directly stress-tests the zero-ask quality-model recheck added in v2.27: ten wordy no-question messages each get a second look that must still return nothing. See mft_test_answer_key_5.md.
